texto: When I went to the University of California, Santa Barbara, in 2002, I decided I wanted to leave my car at home and create an experiment with my own life. I'd only be able to find creative solutions to transportation if I felt the pain of trying to get to downtown at 10 o'clock at night.
explicacao: Citação de Logan Green sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “When I went to the University of California, Santa Barbara, in 2002, I decided I wanted to leave …” articula vida, home, pain em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: When I went to the University of California, Santa Barbara, in 2002, I decided I wanted to leave my car at home and create an experiment with my own life. I'd only be able to find creative solutions to transportation if I felt the pain of trying to get to downtown at 10 o'clock at night.
